etimesMeet Khaby Lame, whose simple shrug and stare gesture made him the most followed TikToker in the worldFrom factory worker to global sensation, Khaby Lame's silent comedy on TikTok has captivated millions. His signature shrug and stare, born from mocking complex life hacks, propelled him to internet stardom. etimes'Bring an LPG cylinder, get 50 plates of momos': Viral offer grabs internet’s attentionAn Indo-Chinese café chain is offering 50 plates of momos in exchange for a commercial LPG cylinder, drawing attention online amidst ongoing supply disruptions. The unusual "Gas for us, Momos for you!" promotion highlights the restaurant's challenges in maintaining operations and has been humorously dubbed the 'return of the barter system' by social media users.

etimes‘People are preparing for a crisis’: Vizag shop sells 100 induction stoves in 48 hoursAmidst growing concerns over LPG supply shortages across India, households are rapidly shifting to electric cooking solutions. A viral video from Vizag showcases a local electronics store selling over 100 induction cookers in just two days, highlighting a significant surge in demand as people prepare for potential cooking gas crises.
